name: agpair-companion-extension
description: Companion extension that bridges agpair CLI and Antigravity via localhost HTTP. Runs inside the Antigravity IDE extension host.

antigravityCompanion.bridgePort.description: Port for the localhost bridge HTTP server.

antigravityCompanion.bridgeToken.description: Bearer token for bridge authentication. When empty (default), a secure random token is auto-generated and stored in VS Code secret storage. Set a value to override with your own token. To disable auth entirely, use bridgeInsecure instead.

antigravityCompanion.bridgeInsecure.description: Disable bridge authentication for local debugging. When true, mutating endpoints accept unauthenticated requests. WARNING: any local process can call the bridge. Only enable for trusted local development.

antigravityCompanion.monitorIntervalMs.description: Polling interval for the SDK event monitor (milliseconds).

antigravityCompanion.trajectoryIntervalM.description: Polling interval for trajectory step count changes (milliseconds).

antigravityCompanion.agentBusWatchEnable.description: Start a local agent-bus watch loop on extension activation so Antigravity begins receiving Codex task briefs automatically.

antigravityCompanion.agentBusWatchInterv.description: Polling interval for the background agent-bus watch loop (milliseconds).

antigravityCompanion.agentBusWatchComman.description: Command used to start the shared agent-bus watcher. Defaults to agent-bus and falls back to ~/.local/bin/agent-bus when available.

antigravityCompanion.delegationTaskTimeo.description: Maximum idle time for a delegated task before the extension auto-sends BLOCKED and releases the workspace (milliseconds).
